creator: leo9641@yandex.ru
text:
(In reply to Nathan from comment #2)

1. When selected NAGIOS3, macros `NAGIOS4_CONFIGURE_WITH=nagios4` make option --without-nagios4 for configure script from mk-livestatus. But in this case mk-livestatus build with -DNAGIOS4. Its a bug (I'm not sure, may be wrong automake script from package). We have been using this package for a long time, but the latest update has broken it.

$ mk-livestatus-1.2.8p20> ./configure --without-nagios4
$ mk-livestatus-1.2.8p20> grep NAGIOS Makefile
CPPFLAGS = -g -O2 -DNAGIOS4

$ mk-livestatus-1.2.8p20> ./configure --with-nagios4
$ mk-livestatus-1.2.8p20> grep CPPFLAGS Makefile
CPPFLAGS = -g -O2 -DNAGIOS4

$ mk-livestatus-1.2.8p20> ./configure
$ mk-livestatus-1.2.8p20> grep CPPFLAGS Makefile
CPPFLAGS = 


2. net-mgmt/icinga work only with mk-livestatus built with nagios3.

3. We love FreeBSD technology and use poudriere. But at the moment the NAGIOS3 option is not working.
